video.title: Why You Can't Save Money (The Diderot Effect)
video.format: faceless stick-man / flat-2D-cartoon explainer, voiceover-driven, image-to-video

style.global_style_suffix: stickonomics, flat 2D cartoon, bold clean black outlines, flat solid colors, simple shapes, rounded characters with thin stick limbs
style.global_negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, gradients, blurry, watermark, garbled text

character_bible.name: Average Joe
character_bible.description: A standard stick-man with a blue baseball cap, represents the viewer.
character_bible.palette: White body, black outlines, blue cap

character_bible.name: Denis Diderot
character_bible.description: An 18th-century stick-man with a powdered wig and a monocle.
character_bible.palette: White body, black outlines, white wig, red robe

character_bible.name: The Marketer
character_bible.description: A slick stick-man wearing dark sunglasses and a red tie.
character_bible.palette: White body, black outlines, black glasses, red tie

scenes.narration: You feel like you're doing everything right.
scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe smiling confidently with hands on hips, standing in a brightly lit empty room, soft yellow background, flat 2D cartoon, bold clean black outlines, flat solid colors
scenes.motion_prompt: camera slowly pushes in, Joe nods his head up and down slightly

scenes.narration: You budget, you cut back on lattes, you skip the avocado toast.
scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe looking determined, pushing away a giant paper coffee cup and a piece of green avocado toast, flat 2D cartoon, bold clean black outlines, flat solid colors
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe smiling with arms crossed, coffee cup and avocado toast have been replaced by a glowing piggy bank, flat 2D cartoon, bold clean black outlines
scenes.motion_prompt: coffee and toast slide completely off screen to the left, a piggy bank pops up from the bottom right

visual_aid.title: Cutting Expenses
visual_aid.reveal: red X marks aggressively stamp over the latte and toast one by one

scenes.narration: But at the end of the month, your bank account is still flatlining.

characters.name: Average Joe
characters.action: staring in horror at a screen

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, close up of Average Joe with wide eyes and sweat drops, holding his face in shock, staring at a giant ATM screen showing a green line, flat 2D cartoon, dark blue background
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, close up of Average Joe crying, the ATM screen behind him shows a completely flat red line with sparks flying off it, flat 2D cartoon, dark blue background
scenes.motion_prompt: Joe drops his jaw in horror, the green line on the ATM plummets and turns into a flat red line

visual_aid.title: Bank Balance
visual_aid.reveal: line plummets sharply to zero and becomes a pulsing flatline

scenes.narration: Why? Because the game is rigged against your brain.

characters.name: The Marketer
characters.action: pulling puppet strings connected to a glowing human brain

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, The Marketer wearing sunglasses and red tie, grinning sinisterly, hands steepled, puppet strings coming down from his fingers attached to a giant pink cartoon brain, flat 2D cartoon, dark purple shadows
scenes.motion_prompt: camera slowly rotates to correct the dutch angle, the brain throbs slightly

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, completely blank clean pastel yellow background, flat 2D cartoon, no characters, minimal style

scenes.narration: Back in the 18th century, a philosopher named Denis Diderot bought a fancy red robe.

characters.name: Denis Diderot
characters.action: putting on a luxurious red robe

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot in a powdered wig, looking at a plain white robe, flat 2D cartoon, sepia toned 18th century room
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot wearing a glowing, luxurious, vibrant red robe, looking incredibly smug, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.motion_prompt: robe magically changes from white to glowing red, Diderot strikes a proud pose

scenes.narration: Suddenly, his old desk looked ugly next to it, so he bought a new one.

characters.name: Denis Diderot
characters.gesture: pointing dismissively at an old desk

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot in his red robe, looking disgusted, pointing at a broken wooden desk with splinters, flat 2D cartoon, split screen
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot in his red robe, looking ecstatic, standing next to a pristine, shiny golden desk, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.motion_prompt: broken desk slides down out of frame, shiny new gold desk slides up into frame, Diderot claps his hands

visual_aid.title: The Upgrade
visual_aid.reveal: arrow pointing from old to new, glowing yellow

scenes.narration: Then he needed a new rug, new chairs, new everything.

characters.name: Denis Diderot
characters.action: surrounded by a chaotic whirlwind of furniture

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot in his red robe, looking normal in an empty room, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot looking manic, drowning in a pile of fancy chairs, rugs, and paintings, flat 2D cartoon, chaotic composition
scenes.motion_prompt: furniture quickly drops from the ceiling one by one, piling up around Diderot

scenes.narration: One purchase triggered a spiral of consumption that left him broke.
scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot looking sad with empty pockets pulled out, standing next to a single red dot in the center of a spiral, flat 2D cartoon, white background
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Denis Diderot crying with empty pockets, trapped inside a massive red swirling tornado graphic, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.motion_prompt: the single red dot spins and grows rapidly into a massive tornado shape that traps him

visual_aid.title: The Spiral
visual_aid.reveal: a circular arrow draws itself faster and faster outward

characters.name: Average Joe
characters.gesture: looking directly at camera, holding a credit card

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, close up of Average Joe looking guilty directly at the viewer, holding a shiny plastic credit card out, flat 2D cartoon, modern neon background
scenes.motion_prompt: camera slowly pushes in on Joe's guilty face, credit card shimmers

scenes.narration: You buy a new phone, now you need a case, a faster charger, and wireless earbuds.
scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, a single sleek modern smartphone sitting alone on a flat clean table, flat 2D cartoon, stark white background
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, a smartphone in the center surrounded by a web of accessories: phone case, fast charging brick, and wireless earbuds, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.motion_prompt: accessories pop onto the table one by one, connecting to the phone with dashed lines

visual_aid.title: Accessory Trap
visual_aid.reveal: dashed arrows draw outward from the phone to the other items

scenes.narration: Marketers know this. They don't sell products; they sell ecosystems.

characters.name: The Marketer
characters.gesture: arms spread wide like a ringmaster
characters.action: standing in front of a giant walled garden

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, The Marketer looking smug with dark sunglasses, arms spread wide, standing in front of a giant glowing walled garden with tech gadgets floating inside, flat 2D cartoon, bold shadows
scenes.motion_prompt: tech gadgets float slowly behind him, The Marketer chuckles

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, completely blank clean pastel green background, flat 2D cartoon, no characters

scenes.narration: To break the cycle, you have to quarantine your new purchases.

characters.name: Average Joe
characters.gesture: holding up a stop sign hand
characters.action: placing a glowing yellow quarantine tent over a new TV

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe looking serious, standing next to a brand new TV, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe looking serious, the TV is now locked inside a glowing yellow biohazard quarantine cube, flat 2D cartoon
scenes.motion_prompt: a yellow quarantine box drops from above and locks around the TV with a clank

visual_aid.title: Isolation
visual_aid.reveal: a padlock icon snaps shut over the item

scenes.narration: Stop the spiral before the next swipe.

characters.name: Average Joe
characters.action: physically breaking a credit card in half

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, close up of Average Joe holding a credit card that is glowing red and starting to crack, flat 2D cartoon, tense red background
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, close up of Average Joe smiling, the credit card is snapped completely in two pieces, flat 2D cartoon, calm blue background
scenes.motion_prompt: Joe forcefully snaps the credit card in half, background color instantly shifts from red to calm blue

scenes.narration: And finally, put your savings on autopilot.

characters.name: Average Joe
characters.gesture: lounging in a beach chair, sunglasses on
characters.action: sipping a drink while a machine does the work

scenes.image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe relaxing in a beach chair, next to an empty conveyor belt going into a bank vault, flat 2D cartoon, bright sunny background
scenes.end_image_prompt: stickonomics, Average Joe relaxing in a beach chair, bags of money are automatically rolling down the conveyor belt into the bank vault, flat 2D cartoon, bright sunny background
scenes.motion_prompt: money bags slide smoothly along the conveyor belt into the vault on an endless loop

visual_aid.title: Automation
visual_aid.reveal: a robotic arm graphic moves the money bag automatically

scenes.sfx: relaxing ocean waves and soft ding
